CVE-2023-43785.title: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to a boundary condition w ...
CVE-2023-43785.description: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to a boundary condition within the _XkbReadKeySyms() function. This flaw allows a local user to trigger an out-of-bounds read error and read the contents of memory on the system.

CVE-2023-43786.title: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an infinite loop withi ...
CVE-2023-43786.description: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an infinite loop within the PutSubImage() function. This flaw allows a local user to consume all available system resources and cause a denial of service condition.

CVE-2023-43787.title: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an integer overflow wi ...
CVE-2023-43787.description: A vulnerability was found in libX11 due to an integer overflow within the XCreateImage() function. This flaw allows a local user to trigger an integer overflow and execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.
